title: LeafMiner: a reproducible poison-exon discovery pipeline for zebrafish
description: Developed in the Parvez Lab, Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine. LeafMiner is an open-source, end-to-end pipeline for discovering and quantifying unproductive splicing and poison exons in Danio rerio RNA-seq data. It wraps LeafCutter2 with developmentally-resolved PE discovery, POISEN long-read validation, GTEx integration, and a FastAPI + vanilla-JS web app with optional Slurm submission.
keywords: Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine
